_metadata.description: Quality thresholds for visualize_vaewc_results.py. Only experiments meeting ALL thresholds are exported.
_metadata.relaxation_rule: Slightly relaxed from baseline: lower-is-better metrics round UP, higher-is-better round DOWN, to nearest 0.05 (2 decimal places, multiples of 5 in hundredths). calinski_harabasz uses multiples of 5. mmd uses 0.00005 step when value < 0.01.

direction_notes.lower_is_better: fid, mmd, wasserstein, kmeans_davies_bouldin — value must be <= threshold
direction_notes.higher_is_better: kmeans_ari, kmeans_nmi, kmeans_silhouette, kmeans_calinski_harabasz — value must be >= threshold
